task_objective: Fix the late pytest background-thread traceback from _run_blocking worker completion after event loop closure.
tests_added: Added a regression test that cancels _run_blocking, closes the event loop before the worker completes, and asserts no uncaught worker-thread exception is reported.
design_decisions: Kept the existing Future and worker-thread model.
Made worker completion signaling best-effort when the event loop is already closed or closing after cancellation.
results: Targeted cancellation and _run_blocking tests passed after the fix. Full validation was run before commit.
